    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    FinalController
    Controller for the final results screen.
    GameController
    Controller for the main game view.
    GameLogic
    Manages the core game logic for the Escritura Rapida game.
    GameStage
    Represents the primary application window for Escritura Rapida.
    GameTimer
    Manages the countdown timer for each game level.
    IFinalController
    Interface that defines the required navigation actions for the final results controller.
    IGameController
    Interface that defines the required actions for the game controller.
    IGameLogic
    Interface that defines the required operations for game logic management.
    IGameTimer
    Interface that defines the required operations for a game countdown timer.
    IWelcomeController
    Interface that defines the required actions for the welcome screen controller.
    IWords
    Interface that defines the required operations for word management.
    Main
    Entry point of the Escritura Rapida application.
    WelcomeController
    Controller for the welcome screen.
    Words
    Manages the word pool used during the game.
